## 📌 Page Classification (Required)

- [ ] Tutorial
- [ ] How-to Guide
- [ ] Reference
- [ ] Explanation

## 🧱 Layer Classification (Required)

- [ ] Protocol (On-chain / Economic)
- [ ] Network (Off-chain / Operational)
- [ ] Product (Developer-facing)

---

# ✅ Structural Requirements

- [ ] Executive Summary included
- [ ] Formal Definition included
- [ ] Architectural Context included
- [ ] Mechanism-level detail included
- [ ] References & source links included

---

# 🔍 Verifiability

- [ ] All claims traceable to primary sources
- [ ] No speculative language
- [ ] No outdated architectural assumptions
- [ ] No TODO placeholders

---

# 📐 Mathematical Standards (If Applicable)

- [ ] Variables explicitly defined
- [ ] Derivations shown stepwise
- [ ] Inflation parameters defined (if relevant)
- [ ] Issuance separated from fee revenue

---

# 📜 Smart Contracts (If Referenced)

- [ ] Contract name specified
- [ ] Network specified
- [ ] Verified address linked
- [ ] Source repo linked
- [ ] Key functions described

---

# 📊 Diagrams

- [ ] Mermaid syntax valid
- [ ] Diagram renders correctly
- [ ] Diagram reflects current architecture

---

# 📈 Metrics (If Included)

- [ ] No fabricated values
- [ ] Examples clearly labeled
- [ ] Constants verified via contract

---

## 🧠 Contributor Confirmation

I confirm this documentation:

- Follows the Livepeer Documentation Governance Charter
- Meets publication readiness requirements
- Is technically accurate to the best of my knowledge
